idea-plugin.name: TAO LogExt
idea-plugin.description:
TAO LogExt is a highly customizable Android LogCat viewer plugin for Android Studio designed to provide a more readable, performance-optimized, and AI-powered logging experience.

Key Features:

  • Advanced Tag Management: Two-column filtering system with global blacklist (Ignored Tags).
  • Multi-tag Search: Filter by multiple tag names simultaneously using spaces or new lines.
  • AI Integration: Instant log analysis using Gemini AI Agent (Studio Bot) directly from the context menu.
  • Log Export (AI Optimized): Save filtered optimazing logs to a file, reducing token consumption when using external AI models for analysis.
  • Static Log Import: Import and analyze .logcat files from LogCat in separate tabs with full filtering support.
  • Superior Performance: High-speed buffering (100ms updates) ensures IDE responsiveness even during heavy logging.
  • Custom Coloring: Fully customizable foreground and background colors for every log level.
  • Readability: Option to hide duplicate metadata (Date, Time, PID, Tag) in consecutive lines.
  • Tags Preset: Save/load tags presets. Preset history for quick change.
  • Source Navigation: Clickable links for FileName.kt:Line patterns.
  • Workflow Automation: Auto-focus on app start and process persistence.
